sentences.target: Je veux venir, mais je travaille.

translations.fr: Je veux venir, mais je travaille.
translations.en: I want to come, but I'm working.
translations.de: Ich möchte kommen, aber ich arbeite.
translations.yue: 我想嚟，但我而家做緊嘢。
translations.pt: Quero ir, mas estou a trabalhar.
translations.he: אני רוצה לבוא, אבל אני עובד.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đến nhưng tôi đang làm việc.
translations.nl: Ik wil komen, maar ik ben aan het werk.
translations.hi: मैं आना चाहता हूँ, लेकिन मैं काम कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil komme, men jeg jobber.
translations.id: Saya ingin datang, tapi saya sedang bekerja.
translations.sv: Jag vill komma, men jag jobbar.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne komme, men jeg arbejder.
translations.ja: 行きたいけど、仕事中です。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the finite verb 'veux'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (1st person singular), selecting the infinitive 'venir' as its complement to express volition.
Main verb in the infinitive; non-finite complement (xcomp) of the modal 'veux'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two independent clauses in contrast.
Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'travaille' in the second clause.
Lexical verb, present indicative (1st person singular); main predicate of the second clause.

translations.en: We're going out, but it's raining.
translations.es: Vamos a salir, pero está lloviendo.
translations.de: Wir gehen aus, aber es regnet.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要出去，但是在下雨。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся выйти, но идет дождь.
translations.pt: Vamos sair, mas está a chover.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ra ngoài nhưng trời đang mưa.
translations.nl: We gaan uit, maar het regent.
translations.hi: हम बाहर जा रहे हैं, लेकिन बारिश हो रही है.
translations.nb: Vi går ut, men det regner.
translations.id: Kami mau keluar, tapi sedang hujan.
translations.sv: Vi går ut, men det regnar.
translations.da: Vi går ud, men det regner.
translations.ja: 出かけるけど、雨が降っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject (colloquial 'we').
Intransitive verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); main predicate of the first clause.
Coordinating conjunction linking the two clauses.
Impersonal/dummy subject pronoun used with weather verbs.
Impersonal verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) meaning 'to rain'.

translations.de: Es ist schön, aber es ist teuer.
translations.nl: Het is mooi, maar het is duur.
translations.hi: यह सुंदर है, लेकिन यह महंगा है.
translations.nb: Det er fint, men det er dyrt.
translations.sv: Det är fint, men det är dyrt.
translations.cs: Je to hezké, ale je to drahé.
translations.da: Det er pænt, men det er dyrt.
translations.fi: Se on hieno, mutta se on kallis.

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun contracted before vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copular verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular) functioning as auxiliary linking subject to predicate.
Adjective used predicatively as the subject complement.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrast.
Clitic demonstrative pronoun contracted before vowel; subject of the second copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person singular) linking subject to predicate.
Adjective used predicatively as the subject complement.

sentences.target: Tu peux venir, mais pas trop tard.
sentences.reading: /ty pø vəniʁ mɛ pa tʁo taʁ/

translations.fr: Tu peux venir, mais pas trop tard.
translations.ipa: /ty pø vəniʁ mɛ pa tʁo taʁ/
translations.en: You can come, but not too late.
translations.es: Puedes venir, pero no muy tarde.
translations.de: Du kannst kommen, aber nicht zu spät.
translations.it: Puoi venire, ma non troppo tardi.
translations.ko: 와도 되지만 너무 늦게 오지 마세요.
translations.yue: 你可以嚟，但唔好嚟得太夜。
translations.ru: Ты можешь прийти, но не слишком поздно.
translations.pt: Podes vir, mas não muito tarde.
translations.he: אתה יכול לבוא, אבל לא מאוחר מדי.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đến nhưng đừng quá muộn.
translations.ar: يمكنك أن تأتي، لكن لا تتأخر كثيرًا.
translations.nl: Je kunt komen, maar niet te laat.
translations.uk: Ти можеш прийти, але не надто пізно.
translations.hi: तुम आ सकते हो, लेकिन ज्यादा देर मत करना.
translations.pl: Możesz przyjść, ale nie za późno.
translations.el: Μπορείς να έρθεις, αλλά όχι πολύ αργά.
translations.nb: Du kan komme, men ikke for sent.
translations.id: Kamu bisa datang, tapi jangan terlalu terlambat.
translations.sv: Du kan komma, men inte för sent.
translations.ro: Poți să vii, dar nu prea târziu.
translations.cs: Můžeš přijít, ale ne příliš pozdě.
translations.da: Du må gerne komme, men ikke for sent.
translations.fi: Voit tulla, mutta ei kovin myöhään.
translations.ja: 来てもいいけど、あまり遅くならないで。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (2nd person singular), taking the infinitive 'venir' as complement.
Infinitive main verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of the modal 'peux'.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrastive restriction.
Negation adverb used alone (ne-drop) to mean 'not' in the elliptical phrase.
Degree adverb modifying 'tard'.
Adverb of time meaning 'late'; complement in the temporal constraint.
